x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Intent coverage measures how well VA topics cover actual employee inquiry types. Now Assist AI requires comprehensive intent coverage to reduce agent escalation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review unpublished active topics and publish those that are complete and tested. Target: 80%+ of active topics published. Unpublished topics represent intent gaps that Now Assist VA cannot cover.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c50
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Intent coverage measures how well VA topics cover actual employee inquiry types. Now Assist AI requires comprehensive intent coverage to reduce agent escalation.]]></ai_justification><check_name>VA Topic Intent Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaPublished = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    gaPublished.addQuery('active', true);
    gaPublished.addQuery('published', true);
    gaPublished.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaPublished.query();
    var published = gaPublished.next() ? parseInt(gaPublished.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active VA topics found',
            finding: 'No active VA topics found. Topic intent coverage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var unpublished = total - published;
    var pct = Math.round((published / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = published + ' published | ' + unpublished + ' unpublished | ' + pct + '% of active topics published';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of active VA topics are published. Now Assist VA intent coverage is comprehensive — most authored topics are available to users.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active topics are published (' + unpublished + ' unpublished). Now Assist VA intent gaps exist for topics in development — publish high-priority topics to improve AI coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of active topics are published (' + unpublished + ' unpublished). More than half of authored VA topics are unavailable to users — Now Assist VA intent coverage has significant gaps.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module><number>CHK0000507</number><order>70</order><remediation_guidance>Review unpublished active topics and publish those that are complete and tested. Target: 80%+ of active topics published. Unpublished topics represent intent gaps that Now Assist VA cannot cover.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c50</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>VA Topic Intent Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c50</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
